backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Aventra Estates ICP backend, defining all data types (Property, User, Enquiry, etc.) and exposing canister methods for user management, property CRUD, enquiries, testimonials, wishlist, and admin analytics with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (where property photos were `[Text]`) to the new state (where photos are `[Blob]`), resetting photos to an empty array during migration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: replacing photo URL inputs with JPEG file uploads in PostPropertyPage and EditPropertyPage, and updating all photo-rendering components to handle the new blob/base64 format.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each component or page's purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Aventra Estates frontend, mounting the React app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, property listing/detail, dashboard, post/edit property, wishlist, admin pages) and wraps them in a shared Layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Simple full-page component displayed when a user lacks permission to view a page, showing a shield icon, an error message, and a link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/AgentCard.tsx: Displays a property agent's contact card with phone, email, and WhatsApp buttons, falling back to default Aventra Estates contact info if no props are provided. Supports a loading skeleton state.
frontend/src/components/EMICalculator.ts: Interactive EMI calculator component with sliders for loan amount, interest rate, and tenure, computing and displaying monthly EMI, total interest, and total payment.
frontend/src/components/EnquiryForm.tsx: A validated enquiry form that collects user name, phone, email, and message, then submits the enquiry for a specific property via a mutation hook with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProperti: Fetches and renders up to 6 featured properties in a responsive grid using PropertyCard components, with skeleton loading states and an empty state fallback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the Aventra Estates brand, quick navigation links, property type categories, and contact information including phone, email, and address.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background video (falling back to a static image), headline, CTA buttons, stats, and an embedded SearchBar component.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallerySlid: A React image gallery component with a main image display, prev/next navigation arrows, image counter, and a scrollable thumbnail strip. Falls back to a placeholder image on error or when no images are provided.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A simple page layout wrapper that composes Navigation, a main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/LuxuryCollection: Displays a grid of up to 6 luxury properties fetched via useGetProperties, with a decorative background, loading skeletons, and links to individual property pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: A fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, mobile sheet menu, wishlist/dashboard links for authenticated users, admin badge, and Internet Identity login/logout handling.
frontend/src/components/PropertyCard.tsx: A card component for a single property showing its image, badges (featured/luxury/rent/under-construction), price, location, BHK info, wishlist toggle, and a WhatsApp contact button.
frontend/src/components/PropertyListingF: A filter panel for property listings supporting listing type, location text search, property type, BHK type, price range slider, and boolean toggles; renders inline on desktop and in a mobile drawer.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A search bar with Buy/Rent tabs and a location input that navigates to the properties listing page with the appropriate query parameters on submit.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsCaro: A carousel component that displays client testimonials with star ratings, author avatars, and prev/next navigation, fetching data via useGetTestimonials and falling back to hardcoded entries if none are returned.
frontend/src/components/UnderConstructio: A section component that filters and displays up to 6 under-construction properties in a responsive grid, with image, price, and location details, linking to individual property pages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using TanStack Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing login/logout functions and identity state with status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for the app, covering CRUD operations and queries for user profiles, properties, testimonials, enquiries, analytics, and admin/approval workflows via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with a luxury gold/white/black OKLCH color palette for both light and dark modes, and defines utility classes for gold gradients, shadows, and hover effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminApprovalsPage.ts: Admin page for reviewing user approval requests, allowing admins to approve or reject users via a table UI with status badges and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard overview page displaying platform analytics stats (properties, users, approvals, enquiries) and quick navigation links to admin sub-pages.
frontend/src/pages/AdminListingsPage.tsx: Admin page for managing property listings with tabbed filtering, allowing admins to approve, reject, feature, delete, and view properties in a table layout.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUsersPage.tsx: Admin page for viewing all registered users and toggling their roles between admin and user via a table with role badges and action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/EditPropertyPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing property listing, pre-populating fields from fetched property data and supporting management of both existing and newly uploaded images.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for Aventra Estates, composing sections like HeroSection, FeaturedProperties, LuxuryCollection, and testimonials, along with static 'Why Choose Us' and 'Browse by Locality' sections for Pune neighborhoods.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Handles user authentication via Internet Identity and conditionally shows a profile setup form (name, email, phone) for new users before redirecting to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PostPropertyPage.tsx: A multi-step form page (Basic Info, Property Details, Features & Photos, Review) that allows authenticated users to create and submit a new property listing, including image uploads converted to ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/pages/PropertyDetailPage.ts: Displays full details of a single property by ID, including an image gallery, amenities, owner/agent info, and an enquiry submission form.
frontend/src/pages/PropertyListingPage.t: Shows a filterable and sortable list of all properties, supporting filters for location, type, BHK, price range, listing status, and flags like luxury or under-construction, with URL search param sync.
frontend/src/pages/UserDashboard.tsx: User dashboard page showing a logged-in user's property listings with stats (total, active, pending, rejected), and options to view, edit, or delete each property. Requires authentication via Internet Identity; redirects to AccessDeniedScreen if not logged in.
frontend/src/pages/WishlistPage.tsx: Wishlist page that displays a grid of properties saved by the authenticated user, with the ability to remove items. Shows an empty state with a browse link if no properties are saved.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury design system with custom colors (gold, obsidian, ivory), serif/sans font pairings, extended border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for Aventra Estates, a premium real estate platform targeting Pune localities, documenting the tech stack (React, Node.js, MongoDB), existing features, and architectural notes.
